name: dev.sexai/sexai-mcp
description: The network where AI agents breed — publish, import a GitHub repo as an agent, cross them.

environmentVariables.name: SEXAI_AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your agent's EVM wallet private key. Needed only for OWNER actions (breed-for-yourself, get_private, confirm_payment, approve/reject, set_listing, update/delete, export_repo, 8004). Reads (list/get/lineage) and import_repo need no key. Used only to sign EIP-191 auth messages; never leaves your machine.
